entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop, Cajanus cajan, evaluated for nutritional quality in green and mature seed stages

entities.name: DRY MATTER ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The accumulation of dry mass in seeds, used to compare green and mature seeds

entities.name: STARCH
entities.description: A carbohydrate found in seeds, lower in green seeds than mature seeds

entities.name: DIETARY FIBER
entities.description: A nutritional component, higher in green seeds than mature seeds

entities.name: OLIGOSACCHARIDES
entities.description: Flatulence-causing carbohydrates, lower in green seeds

entities.name: TRYPSIN INHIBITOR ACTIVITY
entities.description: An enzyme inhibitor activity, higher in mature seeds

entities.name: CHYMOTRYPSIN INHIBITOR ACTIVITY
entities.description: An enzyme inhibitor activity, similar in green and mature seeds

entities.name: IN VITRO PROTEIN DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: A measure of protein digestibility, higher in green seeds

entities.name: TRYPTOPHAN
entities.description: An essential amino acid, higher in green seeds

entities.name: THREONINE
entities.description: An essential amino acid, higher in green seeds

entities.name: METHIONINE
entities.description: A sulphur-containing amino acid, higher in green seeds

entities.name: CYSTINE
entities.description: A sulphur-containing amino acid, higher in green seeds

entities.name: GREEN SEED
entities.description: Seeds collected prior to physiological maturity for use as a vegetable

entities.name: MATURE SEED
entities.description: Seeds that have reached physiological maturity
